svg.text: ACT 3 — DESATURATED · Rain · Night · Single warm lamp
• Small shrine niche in left wall
Camera tracks King through narrow alley
Rain heavy. No music, just rain sounds.
Puddles reflect his feet. Head bowed.
King meditates seated. Taleju appears in mist.
Lavender glow seeps in at edges of frame.
Her form: soft focus, translucent. No words.
Static camera on seated King, hands in prayer.
Time-lapse feel — rain continues, he is still.
CU: candle flame. CU: empty game board.
CU: incense smoke. CU: his praying hands.
Music builds. Can use still frames + minimal anim.
Orchestral swell. Dawn light beginning. Taleju
• No smooth dollies — grief is unsteady
• Shot 13: extreme close-ups, minimal camera move
• Shot 14: camera slowly rises as orchestral swells
• Lamp flame: subtle flicker on every shot
• King's body: minimal. His stillness is the point.
• Taleju in dream: can be simplified silhouette
• Rain never stops until Act 4 begins
Pacing: slow is right. This is grief.
